calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-13-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: June Lethley.
Ray Garwacki, Jr., Esq. for Plaintiff: Idine Restaurant Group, Inc., a corporation fka Transmedia Restaurant Company, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Stuart Chant, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Simply Smokin' Records Inc., a corporation dba Club Jazz Nouveau and Joseph M. Lee as follows:
Damages $34,756.66
Prejudgment Interest $4,550.56
Attorney's Fees $1,500.00
Costs $419.98, for a total of $41,227.20
Judgment signed in open court.
